en_title: Ubisoft Bids Farewell to Assassin's Creed Shadows With Final Story Update
cn_title: 《刺客信条：影》最终更新上线，育碧正式道别
subtitle: 再见，战国时代
opus_summary: 育碧推出《刺客信条：影》最终更新，为直江与弥助的故事画上句号，并新增高难度终局模式「领域」和《黑旗》联动服装。游戏经历争议和延期后落幕，助理总监致谢玩家。

paragraphs.en: The final Assassin's Creed Shadows content update will add one last chapter to the story of Naoe and Yasuke, a tough new challenge mode, and let you dress up as Edward Kenway from Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced.
paragraphs.cn: 《刺客信条：影》的最终内容更新将为直江与弥助的故事添加最后一章、一个高难度新挑战模式，并允许玩家装扮为《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》中的爱德华·肯威。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft previously confirmed it was calling time on Shadows after dwindling support in recent months and just one major post-launch expansion, and as Resynced's arrival lies on the horizon, just a few weeks away.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧此前已确认将在近期几个月的支持逐渐减少、仅推出一款主要上市后扩展内容之后，结束对《影》的支持，而《记忆重置》也即将在几周后上线。

paragraphs.en: Thankfully, tomorrow's update looks to be a sizable send-off, as the series' Japan-set story wraps up for good with the arrival of a major Templar threat hunting Yasuke. Of the two protagonists, the samurai's story was most in need of closure following the Naoe-focused Claws of Awaji add-on last year. A teaser released today suggests we'll also get a little more Animus story, too, via a fresh rift.
paragraphs.cn: 值得庆幸的是，明天的更新似乎是一个相当隆重的告别，系列以日本为背景的故事随着追捕弥助的重大圣殿骑士威胁到来而彻底完结。在两位主角中，武士的故事最需要收尾，因为去年推出的扩展内容《淡路之爪》主要围绕直江展开。今天发布的一段预告片暗示，我们还将通过一个全新的裂隙获得更多阿尼姆斯故事。

paragraphs.en: Another major addition is Domains, an endgame challenge mode where gear-loving fans will be tasked with min-maxing builds to conquer brutal combat arenas. Exclusive endgame gear will be offered as rewards, including what looks to be some legacy items (Eivor's axe from Valhalla?).
paragraphs.cn: 另一项重要新增内容是「领域」，一个终局挑战模式，喜欢装备的玩家需要极限优化配装来征服残酷的战斗竞技场。专属终局装备将作为奖励提供，其中似乎包括一些传承物品（或许是《英灵殿》中艾沃尔的斧头？）。

paragraphs.en: Two new Animus projects will also be unlocked, and intriguingly, at least one of these will be progressable in Black Flag Resynced as well. You can get the leap on this now by playing Shadows, where you'll unlock Edward Kenway's Assassin robes for Naoe and Blackbeard's outfit for Yasuke, as well as additional lore.
paragraphs.cn: 还将解锁两个新的阿尼姆斯项目，有趣的是，其中至少有一个也可以在《黑旗 记忆重置》中推进。你现在就可以在《影》中抢先体验，为直江解锁爱德华·肯威的刺客长袍，为弥助解锁黑胡子的服装，并获得额外的背景故事。

paragraphs.en: And that's your lot. While there's still understandable excitement for the brilliant Black Flag's return, tomorrow's final update for Shadows marks the end of an era for the franchise — one which many fans who had spent a decade wishing for a samurai-set entry may feel didn't entirely go to plan.
paragraphs.cn: 这就是全部了。虽然对出色的《黑旗》回归感到兴奋完全可以理解，但明天《影》的最终更新标志着这个系列一个时代的终结——许多粉丝十年来一直期盼着一款以武士为主角的作品，他们可能觉得事情并没有完全按计划发展。

paragraphs.en: From various controversies that distracted attention pre-launch, a high-profile delay, and reports that more post-launch content was shelved, Shadows will certainly go down as a memorable entry in the Assassin's Creed saga — although maybe not always for all the right reasons.
paragraphs.cn: 从发售前各种分散注意力的争议、一次高调的延期，到更多上市后内容被取消的报道，《影》无疑将成为《刺客信条》传奇中令人难忘的一作——尽管可能并不总是出于所有正确的原因。

paragraphs.en: "Here we are, at the end of all things," noted Shadows assistant game director Simon Lemay-Comtois, who has been the public face of the game's post-launch content updates over the past year. "We really hope you'll enjoy what we've been cooking for this last chapter of Sengoku-era Japan. Experiencing this adventure alongside each and every one of you has been truly inspiring.
paragraphs.cn: 「我们终于走到了终点，」《影》的助理游戏总监Simon Lemay-Comtois说道，他在过去一年里一直担任游戏上市后内容更新的公众代言人。「我们衷心希望大家会喜欢我们为战国时代日本的最后一章所精心准备的内容。与每一位玩家一起经历这场冒险，真的令人深受鼓舞。」

paragraphs.en: "Your thoughts and feedback has opened up a conversation between us, the developers, and you, the community, paving a more open future for the Assassin's Creed franchise. On behalf of everyone here at Ubisoft who made Assassin's Creed Shadows, we thank you."
paragraphs.cn: 「你们的想法和反馈开启了开发者与社区之间的对话，为《刺客信条》系列铺就了一个更加开放的未来。我谨代表育碧所有参与制作《刺客信条：影》的同事，向大家表示感谢。」

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
